subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 190626526/583245413 is not a GRB
body:
C. Fletcher (USRA) reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

�The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 190626526/583245413
at 12:36:48.94 UT on 26 June 2019, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact
not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to an unknown source."

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit
the official Fermi GBM Support Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/
